title: Hieracium miansarofii
taxonomy: Hieracium miansarofii is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the aster family. It belongs to the genus Hieracium, commonly known as hawkweeds. Hieracium miansarofii is classified as a member of the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Within the Asteraceae family, Hieracium miansarofii is further classified as a member of the subfamily Cichorioideae. The exact classification of Hieracium miansarofii may vary depending on the source.

The health benefits of Hieracium species, including Hieracium miansarofii, include their potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
